title: Kernel MCP Server
description: Connect your AI tools directly to Kernel's entity database via Model Context Protocol. Works with Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible client.

title: Bulk enrichment API v2
description: Redesigned bulk enrichment endpoint with streaming responses, better error handling, and support for up to 50k records per batch.

title: LinkedIn identity resolution improvements
description: Improved matching accuracy for LinkedIn URLs to KERN IDs, including better handling of vanity URLs and regional profiles.

title: Salesforce managed package v3.1
description: Updated Salesforce package with support for custom object mapping, field-level sync controls, and improved error logging.

title: Corporate hierarchy depth increase
description: Extended hierarchy resolution from 5 to 12 levels, covering complex multinational structures like franchise networks and holding companies.
